_meta.note: Seed data for SAT-MAKON. 'enrollments' = the spec's Assignment object (unique per student+subject); teacher_id:null means the pair has no teacher and must appear in the admin Unassigned view. Derived values (masked names, assessment means, stream/main ratings, ranks, eligibility) are NOT stored here - the engine computes them by replay.
_meta.mock_auth_password: mock1234 for every staff account (FAKE - replace with real auth before launch)

edge_cases.stu_freshman: NEW, joined 2026-06-10 (<=15) -> eligible 2026-07. Has June assessments but NO rank; profile shows 'eligible from 2026-07' banner.
edge_cases.stu_transfer: Transfer student, entered as NEW -> settles. Joined 2026-06-20 (>15) -> eligible 2026-08.
edge_cases.stu_single: Established, enrolled in Math ONLY -> never on main board; belongs on the (deferred) Math sub-board.
edge_cases.stu_thin: Both subjects but English has only 1 assessment -> 1 qualifying stream -> NOT ranked on main board ('strong + thin').
edge_cases.stu_unassigned: Enrolled in English with teacher_id:null -> appears in admin Unassigned view; only Math qualifies -> not ranked.
edge_cases.stu_archived: archived:true -> off all boards, history preserved.
edge_cases.stu_01: Some May Math assessments by tch_former (archived teacher) -> history must still resolve that teacher's name.
edge_cases.tch_bobur: Teaches BOTH Math and English (some students appear as two deck cards under this teacher).
edge_cases.tch_former: archived:true -> cannot log in / not assignable, but name resolves in past history.
